text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, in a quaint little town called Whiskerbush, there lived a wise old owl named Owley. Owley knew lots of stories. Especially scary ones.

One grey afternoon, Owley heard whispers creeping through the trees. Creatures nocturnal said they were seeing shapes silhouetted against the sky.

Owley cared. Ever. So he flew south. Found an old farmer's pantry. Lots of apples.

Night buzzed.

An apple flew.

At owl.

"Hmm."

That night Owley heard whispers louder. Sounds strange.

Tomorrow morning.

There was nothing. Owley flew.

Thoughts?

A park.

That's where dreams catch fire.

He flew.

He paused.

A girl.


No feather.




So soft.

Then whispers stopped.

She smiled.

That's my story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
